channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: A roadmap for AI, if anyone will listen
item.description: The Pro-Human Declaration was finalized before last week's Pentagon-Anthropic standoff, but the collision of the two events wasn’t lost on anyone involved.

item.title: 10 ways teachers can use AI
item.description: A few practical ways anyone who teaches, coaches, or leads can put AI to work. This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps.

item.title: Push for $40 smartphones builds momentum, but still faces cost hurdles
item.description: A coalition of telecom operators and device makers is pushing $40 smartphones to bring up to 20 million people online, but rising component costs threaten the plan.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for March 8, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 8
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 8, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: How to unblock XNXX for free
item.description: How to unblock porn for free. Unblock and watch XNXX from anywhere in the world.
